subcodes.first_line: O Aqa Khan! The sweet fragrances of the All-Merciful have been wafted abroad, yet the people remain in manifest remoteness, having cast behind them the Cause of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا آقا خان قد فاحت نفحه الرحمن و القوم فی بعد مبین نبذوا امر الله ورائهم متمسکین
